title: How a Godly Man Leads Before It Costs Him Anything
caption:
Every man in the room can talk about leadership. Not many will pay for it first.

A godly man doesn't wait for a title to start leading. He apologizes before it's fair, takes the shift nobody wants, says the hard sentence before he's asked to, and stays when leaving would cost him nothing.

Christ didn't lead from the exit. He led from the cross, first into every cost that mattered.

This week, find the cost nobody's asking you to pay yet. Pay it anyway.

Lead first. Then let them follow.

Save this for the next time you're waiting for permission to lead.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #discipleship #scripture #brotherhood
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
